Patch Set 21:

Will this fail testing if mdssizegb is not set? Should we update local.sh in that case?

Patch Set 21:

>Will this fail testing if mdssizegb is not set? ...

Yes it will. 'ior' bails out with no space (on mds)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
WARNING: Task 0, partial write(), 4096 of 8192 bytes at offset 98304
ior ERROR: write() failed, errno 28, No space left on device (aiori-POSIX.c:451)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
MPI_ABORT was invoked on rank 2 in communicator MPI_COMM_WORLD 
with errorcode -1.


>... Should we update local.sh in that case?

local.sh will affect all test-case mounts(mdssize). IMO, cannot increase it to very large size as dev vm's/containors are very size limited. Better would be to add a "skip" check under dom-performance.sh/test_IOR to skip if required mdssize is not found.

Patch Set 21:

> Better would be to add a "skip" check under dom-performance.sh/test_IOR
 > to skip if required mdssize is not found.

Yes, that would make sense.

Patch Set 21:

>Yes, that would make sense.
I Will add this check in a different patch. Thanks.
Patch Set 21: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 4a4d888a07da2eaec5723473cdc5440768b4a9e3 by Oleg Drokin

parents.subject: LU-15314 utils: set default max-inherit to 3

commit.subject: LU-6142 tests: Fix style issues for statmany.c
commit.message:
LU-6142 tests: Fix style issues for statmany.c

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for file lustre/tests/statmany.c

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn,dom-performance,replay-dual mdssizegb=20
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ieb2e8aff7d45c7de3ff5035c9c00dafe82b27d31
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/36386
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Petros Koutoupis <petros.koutoupis@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
